description: Schema for hivemetastore Helm chart values.

io.k8s.api.core.v1.ResourceRequirements.description: ResourceRequirements describes the compute resource requirements.

limits.description: Limits describes the maximum amount of compute resources allowed. More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/

requests.description: Requests describes the minimum amount of compute resources required. If Requests is omitted for a container, it defaults to Limits if that is explicitly specified, otherwise to an implementation-defined value. Requests cannot exceed Limits. More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/

image.description: Container image settings for the Hive Metastore deployment.

repository.description: Docker image repository for the Hive Metastore container.

pullPolicy.description: Image pull policy used by Kubernetes.

tag.description: Image tag for the Hive Metastore container.

imagePullSecrets.description: Optional image pull secrets for accessing private container registries.

nameOverride.description: Override for the chart release name.

fullnameOverride.description: Override for the full chart release name.

priorityClassName.description: Optional priority class name for the Pod.

serviceAccount.description: Service account configuration for the Hive Metastore Pod.

create.description: Whether to create a service account for the deployment.

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the created service account.

name.description: Name of the service account to use when create is false.

podAnnotations.description: Annotations to add to the Hive Metastore Pod.

podSecurityContext.description: Pod-level security context for the Hive Metastore Pod.

securityContext.description: Container-level security context for the Hive Metastore Pod.

drop.description: Capabilities to drop from the container.

seccompProfile.description: Seccomp profile configuration for the container.

allowPrivilegeEscalation.description: Whether the container can gain more privileges than its parent process.

readOnlyRootFilesystem.description: Whether the container filesystem should be mounted read-only.

runAsNonRoot.description: Whether the container should run as a non-root user.

runAsUser.description: UID to run the container process as.

enabled.description: Enable Prometheus monitoring annotations and scraping.

prometheusRules.description: Prometheus alert rule configuration for the Hive Metastore.

enabled.description: Enable or disable Prometheus alert rules.

cpuThreshold.description: CPU usage percentage threshold for alerts.

memoryThreshold.description: Memory usage percentage threshold for alerts.

service.description: Kubernetes Service configuration for Hive Metastore.

type.description: Kubernetes service type exposed for the Hive Metastore.

port.description: Service port for the Hive Metastore Thrift endpoint.

tls.description: TLS configuration for Hive Metastore communication.

enabled.description: Enable TLS for the Hive Metastore service.

serverSideTls.description: Enable server-side TLS for the Hive Metastore service.

secretName.description: Secret name used to store generated certificates.

create.description: Whether to create a JKS keystore.

subjectAlternativeName.description: Subject Alternative Names for generated certificates.

additionalDnsNames.description: Additional DNS names to include in the certificate SAN.

additionalIpAddresses.description: Additional IP addresses to include in the certificate SAN.

certificates.description: TLS certificate and keystore values for the Hive Metastore.

jks_key.description: JKS keystore password used by the Hive Metastore.

keystore_jks.description: JKS keystore contents for the Hive Metastore.

truststore_jks.description: JKS truststore contents for the Hive Metastore.

extraSecrets.description: Additional Kubernetes Secret definitions to merge into the chart.

extraVolumes.description: Additional Pod volumes to mount into the Hive Metastore Pod.

extraVolumeMounts.description: Extra volume mounts for the Hive Metastore container.

env.description: Additional environment variables to pass into the Hive Metastore container.

hiveMetastore.description: Hive Metastore container resource requests and limits.

resources.description: Compute Resources required by this container. Cannot be updated. More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/

livenessProbe.description: Liveness probe configuration for the Hive Metastore container.

readinessProbe.description: Readiness probe configuration for the Hive Metastore container.

nodeSelector.description: Node selector labels for scheduling the Hive Metastore Pod.

tolerations.description: Kubernetes tolerations for the Hive Metastore Pod.

affinity.description: Affinity rules for scheduling the Hive Metastore Pod.

secretMounts.description: Secret mounts for the Hive Metastore Pod.

hiveInitJob.description: Configuration for the Hive Metastore initialization job.

enabled.description: Enable the Hive Metastore init job.

upgradeSchema.description: Upgrade the Hive Metastore schema during init.

cleanupDB.description: Clean up the database during init.

priorityClassName.description: Priority class name for the init job Pod.

initAnnotations.description: Helm hook annotations for the init job.

resources.description: Compute Resources required by this container. Cannot be updated. More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/

s3InitJob.description: Configuration for the S3 initialization job.

awsSigV4.description: AWS signature version string for S3 access.

disableTLSValidation.description: Disable TLS validation for S3 initialization.

priorityClassName.description: Priority class name for the S3 init job Pod.

initAnnotations.description: Helm hook annotations for the S3 init job.

resources.description: Compute Resources required by this container. Cannot be updated. More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/

s3.description: S3 storage credentials and endpoint settings.

warehouseDir.description: S3 warehouse directory used by Hive Metastore.

hive.description: Hive database credentials for the Hive Metastore.

postgres.description: PostgreSQL connection settings for the Hive Metastore.

driver.description: JDBC driver class name for PostgreSQL.

adminUser.description: PostgreSQL admin username used for database management.

adminPassword.description: PostgreSQL admin password used for database management.

psqlParams.description: Additional psql parameters for PostgreSQL connections.

jdbcParams.description: Additional JDBC parameters appended to the PostgreSQL URL.

initJobCredentialsSecret.description: Annotations for the init job credentials secret hook.

annotations.description: Annotations applied to the init job credentials secret.

metastoreSiteProperties.default:
<configuration>
      <property>
        <name>metastore.warehouse.dir</name>
        <value>{{ include  "s3.warehouseDir" . }}</value>
      </property>
      <property>
        <name>metastore.thrift.port</name>
        <value>{{ .Values.service.port }}</value>
      </property>
      <property>
        <name>metastore.initial.metadata.count.enabled</name>
        <value>true</value>
        <description>Enable a metadata count at metastore startup for metrics.</description>
      </property>
      <property>
        <name>metastore.metrics.enabled</name>
        <value>true</value>
        <description>Enable metrics on the metastore.</description>
      </property>
      <property>
        <name>metastore.metrics.reporters</name>
        <value>JMX</value>
      <description>A comma separated list of metrics reporters to start</description>
      </property>
      <property>
        <name>metastore.async.log.enabled</name>
        <value>true</value>
      </property>
    </configuration>

metastoreConfigsecret.description: Secret-based metastore and core site configuration content.

metastoreSitePropertiesSecret.description: Secret value containing Metastore site properties XML.
metastoreSitePropertiesSecret.default:
<configuration>
    {{- if .Values.tls.serverSideTls }}
      <property>
        <name>metastore.use.SSL</name>
        <value>true</value>
      </property>
      <property>
        <name>metastore.keystore.path</name>
        <value>/opt/hive-metastore/certs/keystore.jks</value>
      </property>
      <property>
        <name>metastore.keystore.password</name>
        <value>{{ .Values.tls.certificates.jks_key }}</value>
      </property>
    {{- end }}
      <property>
        <name>metastore.task.threads.always</name>
        <value>org.apache.hadoop.hive.metastore.events.EventCleanerTask</value>
      </property>
      <property>
        <name>metastore.expression.proxy</name>
        <value>org.apache.hadoop.hive.metastore.DefaultPartitionExpressionProxy</value>
      </property>
      <property>
        <name>javax.jdo.option.ConnectionDriverName</name>
        <value>{{ .Values.postgres.driver }}</value>
      </property>
      <property>
        <name>javax.jdo.option.ConnectionURL</name>
        <value>jdbc:postgresql://{{ include "postgres.host" . }}:{{ include "postgres.port" . }}/{{ include "postgres.hive.db" . }}{{ include "jdbcParams" (dict "Values" .Values "separator" "&")}}</value>
      </property>
      <property>
        <name>javax.jdo.option.ConnectionUserName</name>
        <value>{{ include "postgres.hive.user" . }}</value>
      </property>
      <property>
        <name>javax.jdo.option.ConnectionPassword</name>
        <value>{{ include "postgres.hive.password" . }}</value>
      </property>
    </configuration>

coreSitePropertiesSecret.description: Secret value containing core-site XML content.

jmxConfig.description: JMX exporter configuration for the Hive Metastore.

jmxExporterConfig.description: Configuration content for the JMX exporter.
jmxExporterConfig.default:
startDelaySeconds: 0
    ssl: false
    lowercaseOutputName: true
    lowercaseOutputLabelNames: true
    attrNameSnakeCase: true
    includeObjectNames:
      - "metrics:*"
      - "org.apache.hadoop.hive.metastore:*"
      - "jvm:*"
      - "process:*"
      - "java.lang:*"
    rules:         
      - pattern: "metrics<name=total_count_dbs><>Value"
        name: "count_db"
        help: "Total DBs count."
      - pattern: "metrics<name=delete_total_count_dbs><>Count"
        name: "delete_total_count_db"
        help: "metrics_delete_total_count_dbs_count Attribute exposed for management"
      - pattern: "metrics<name=total_count_tables><>Value"
        name: "metrics_count_tables"
        help: "metrics_total_count_tables_value Attribute exposed for management"
      - pattern: "metrics<name=delete_total_count_tables><>Count"
        name: "delete_total_count_tables"
        help: "Count table delete"
      - pattern: "metrics<name=open_connections><>Count"
        name: "open_connections_count"
        help: "Open connections attribute exposed for management"
      - pattern: "metrics<name=memory.heap.used><>Value"
        name: "metrics_heap_used"
        help: "metrics_heap_used_value metrics_memory_heap_used_value Attribute exposed for management"
      - pattern: "java.lang<name=MarkSweepCompact, type=GarbageCollector><>CollectionTime"
        name: "marksweepcompact_collectionTime"
        help: "java_lang_marksweepcompact_collectiontime CollectionTime"
      - pattern: "metrics<name=total_count_partitions><>Value"
        name: "metrics_total_count_partitions_hv"
        help: "metrics_total_count_partitions_value Attribute exposed for management"
      - pattern: "metrics<name=create_total_count_partitions><>Count"
        name: "metrics_create_total_count_partitions_hv"
        help: "metrics_create_total_count_partitions_count Attribute exposed for management"
      - pattern: "metrics<name=delete_total_count_partitions><>Count"
        name: "metrics_delete_total_count_partitions_hv"
        help: "metrics_delete_total_count_partitions_count Attribute exposed for management"

log4j2Properties.description: Log4j2 configuration properties for the Hive Metastore.
log4j2Properties.default:
status = INFO
  name = MetastoreLog4j2
  packages = org.apache.hadoop.hive.metastore

  # list of properties
  property.metastore.log.level = INFO
  property.metastore.root.logger = console
  property.metastore.log.dir = ${sys:java.io.tmpdir}/${sys:user.name}
  property.metastore.log.file = metastore.log
  property.hive.perflogger.log.level = INFO

  # list of all appenders
  appenders = console

  # console appender
  appender.console.type = Console
  appender.console.name = console
  appender.console.target = SYSTEM_ERR
  appender.console.layout.type = PatternLayout
  appender.console.layout.pattern = %d{ISO8601} %5p [%t] %c{2}: %m%n

  # list of all loggers
  loggers = DataNucleus, Datastore, JPOX, PerfLogger

  logger.DataNucleus.name = DataNucleus
  logger.DataNucleus.level = ERROR

  logger.Datastore.name = Datastore
  logger.Datastore.level = ERROR

  logger.JPOX.name = JPOX
  logger.JPOX.level = ERROR
  
  logger.PerfLogger.name = org.apache.hadoop.hive.ql.log.PerfLogger
  logger.PerfLogger.level = ${sys:hive.perflogger.log.level}

  # root logger
  rootLogger.level = ${sys:metastore.log.level}
  rootLogger.appenderRefs = root
  rootLogger.appenderRef.root.ref = ${sys:metastore.root.logger}
